name: Crusty Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the potatoes into a bowl filled with cold water.
2. In another bowl, combine the onion, egg, flour, and salt.
3. Drain the grated potatoes, pressing out all liquid.
4. Beat the potatoes into batter.
5. Melt the butter with oil in a large skillet.
6. Spoon heaping tablespoons of batter into the skillet, spreading it with the back of a spoon into 4-inch rounds.
7. Brown on both sides and drain on paper towels.
